_controller_patches.node_2_F5TTSAudioInputs: inputs.sample_text    <- text spoken in the voice_ref clip

_voice_ref_note: Place cast/spokesman/voice_ref.wav in the project folder.
Also create cast/spokesman/voice_ref.txt containing the exact words spoken in that clip.
F5-TTS uses the text to align the reference — empty string works but lowers quality.
5-15 seconds of clear speech is ideal for the reference clip.

inputs.speech: Placeholder. Controller patches this field with the scene audio prompt.
